title: Ennai Konjam Maatri Song Lyrics Kaakha Kaakha
stanzas:
Ennai Konjam Maatri Song Lyrics Kaakha Kaakha
#Thamarai #HarrishJayaraj #Tippu

Siragugal neeludhe
paravaigal polave
vinvili thaandiye
thulli thulli poguthe.

Pudhu vidha anubavam
nodiyinil perugidum
iruvarin uyirayum
alli alli parugudhe

ennai konjam maattri
en nenjil unnai oottri
nee mella mella ennai kolladhe

netrum indrum vera
indru kaanum naanum naana?
un paechil ennai
veelthi sellaadhe

onney onnu sollanum
un mugathai paarthu
sollanum.
thanimai konjam
kidaikka koodaadha

naanam maarip ponathe
en nalinam koodi ponathe
adhu therinthaal neeye
sollak koodathaa.

wawooo oho wawoo ooho
yaarai naan kaetpen
nee sollvaayaa ?

wawooo oho wawoo ooho
yaarai naan kaetpen
neeye sollvaayaa ?

ennai konjam maattri
en nenjil unnai oottri
nee mella mella ennai kolladhe

netrum indrum vera
indru kaanum naanum naana?
un paechil ennai
veelthi sellaadhe

varugira valigalil
malargalin koottam
undu oru murai kooda
nindru rasithathillai.

indru mattum konjam nindru
oru poovai kili kondu
sirippudan selven endru
ninaithathillai illai.

nee killum pookkalai
naan soodi kollave
endginra ennam indre
vandhaache..

aanaalum nerile
eppodhum polave
iyalbaaga pesi povadhu
ennaachu.

Wohowooo ..
ennai konjam maattri
en nenjil unnai oottri
nee mella mella ennai kolladhe

netrum indrum vera
indru kaanum naanum naana?
un paechil ennai
veelthi sellaadhe

vinvili thaandiye
thulli thulli poguthe.

Pudhu vidha anubavam
nodiyinil perugidum
iruvarin uyirayum
alli alli parugudhe

Ennai ingae varacheithaai
ennavao pesa seithaai
punnagaikal pookka seithaai
innum enna.

aruginil amarthennai
uttru uttru paarkkum
undhan thuru thuru
paarvai konda artham enna
enna.

en paarvai pudhusuthaan
en paechum pudhusuthaan
unnaale naanum
maarip poneney.

kootthathil ennaithaan
un kangal thaedanum
endrellaam ennum
paithiyam aaneney.

seo.title: Ennai Konjam Maatri Song Lyrics Kaakha Kaakha
seo.description: Full Ennai Konjam Maatri songs lyrics, Kaakha Kaakha Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Thamarai, Singer(s): Shalini Singh, Timmy, Tipu.
seo.keywords: Thamarai, Kaakha Kaakha, Harrish Jeyaraj, Shalini Singh, Timmy, Tipu, Ennai Konjam Maatri full lyrics, Kaakha Kaakha songs lyrics, Ennai Konjam Maatri lyrics snippets, Ennai Konjam Maatri WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Ennai Konjam Maatri lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ennai Konjam Maatri'?

The song expresses feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional connection between two individuals.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Kaakha Kaakha'?

In the movie, the song reflects the romantic moments shared between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who are the singers of 'Ennai Konjam Maatri'?

The song features the talented voices of Shalini Singh, Timmy, and Tipu.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Thamarai.

When was 'Ennai Konjam Maatri' released?

The song was released on August 1, 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ennai Konjam Maatri', the protagonists experience a deep emotional connection that is beautifully captured through the song's lyrics and melody. The song conveys themes of love, longing, and the bittersweet nature of relationships. As the characters navigate their feelings, the music enhances the romantic atmosphere, evoking a sense of nostalgia and yearning. This melody stands out for its heartfelt delivery and lyrical depth, making it a memorable piece in the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennai Konjam Maatri from Kaakha Kaakha is a beautifully crafted romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Shalini Singh, Timmy, and Tipu, this song creates a mesmerizing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The lyrical depth penned by Thamarai adds a unique touch, making it a must-listen for anyone who appreciates heartfelt music.
stanzaMeanings: The wings are blue, like birds flying, they flutter and go beyond the horizon.
A new kind of experience is growing in the moment, the lives of two people are flowing together.
Change me a little, in my heart, don't slowly take me away from you.
Yesterday, today, and tomorrow, am I still the same? Don't let your words push me away.
I need to tell you something, looking at your face. Don't let loneliness take over.
My identity hasn't changed, my good days haven't changed, if you understand that, you shouldn't have to say it.
Wohowooo .. Change me a little, in my heart, don't slowly take me away from you.
Yesterday, today, and tomorrow, am I still the same? Don't let your words push me away.
The wings are blue, like birds flying, they flutter and go beyond the horizon.
A new kind of experience is growing in the moment, the lives of two people are flowing together.
You have come here, what have you said? You have made flowers bloom, what else is there?
In the nearby place, your gaze is like a sharp arrow, what does it mean?
My gaze is new, my words are new, because of you, I have changed.
In the dance, my eyes are searching for yours, and I have become crazy about everything.
